title: ContactPresence lacks Display impl; inconsistent with OwnerPresence
description: OwnerPresence (the owner's self-reported presence) has as_str() and Display impls. ContactPresence (a contact's observed presence) has neither, even though they represent the same conceptual domain. Users who want to log or display a contact's current presence state must resort to serde_json::to_string and strip the surrounding quotes, which is awkward. The Missing Display is especially noticeable since the app UI needs to show presence states as text. Fix: add ContactPresence::as_str() returning the lowercase wire string, and impl Display for ContactPresence. The Unknown variant can map to "unknown" for display purposes since ContactPresence is receive-only.
